title: Haplolobus floribundus
taxonomy: Haplolobus floribundus is classified as a species of plant in the family Burseraceae. This plant is native to Papua New Guinea. It belongs to the genus Haplolobus, which is part of the order Sapindales. The classification of Haplolobus floribundus is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Sapindales, family Burseraceae, genus Haplolobus, and species H. floribundus. Further research may be necessary for a more detailed understanding of its classification.
